$instructions: 1. Create a Genie Space in the Databricks UI
2. Add your Delta Lake tables as data sources
3. PATCH the Genie Space to add table_identifiers (UI doesn't always save these):
4. Grant CAN_RUN to the app service principal AND the users who will use the demo
5. Reference the Genie Space ID in the MAS config
name: TODO Demo Data
description: Natural language interface to TODO demo Delta Lake tables

table_identifiers.$comment: List all tables the Genie Space should know about

instructions: You are a data assistant for the TODO domain. Answer questions about TODO using SQL queries against the connected tables. Always provide specific numbers and be precise.
